0.title: Button to filter videos that were already seen
0.description: When we display all the videos of a channel, it would be nice to have a button that allows filtering to display only the videos that we haven't seen yet.

1.title: Splitting the videos and subs pages into two separate pages
1.description:
At the moment videomiam is just a single massive page, with all the code and scripts in a single page. 
I need to split this into several pages/script to make it easier to maintain

2.title: Add a new page for displaying a list of anime
2.description: Prepare a new page that can display a list of animes. The page can be mostly empty for now

3.title: Update the database schema to register animes
3.description:
Add a new table in the database schema to register Animes. Here are some of the fields necessary in this table: 
- id
- malId (MyAnimeList)
- Title
- Status (Completed, In progress...)
- Number of episodes
- Related Animes (prequels, sequels...)
- imageURL
- malURL
- synopsis
- genres

4.title: Add a button to add a new suggested anime
4.description: Add a button in the anime page to allow to enter an url/malID to insert into the database.

5.title: Display animes from the data
5.description: Read the content of the database, and populate the list of animes on the webpage.

6.title: Prevent auto update DB in dev
6.description: When I start main.js in dev mode, I don't want to automatically make queries to update the database. Maybe pass a --dev argument?

7.title: Retrieve data from MAL
7.description: Retrieve the information from MyAnimeList about an anime, and add the data into the database

8.title: Remove additional empty line when printing command
8.description: When we print a command, there is always an empty line between the command and its printed result.

9.title: Handle the requests to mark an anime as watched/not interested
9.description:
There are two buttons for each anime in the list, to indicate that the anime 
was already watched, or that we are not interested. Write the code to handle these requests

10.title: Fixing some styling issues
10.description: Should add some space between anime items
